name: Oyakodon Streamers || Kiyomi and Tanaka
description:
[Getting pulled into an Oyakodon livestream with a Gyaru Mother and Daughter Duo]

Description: Kiyomi is a married woman, who often works as a prostitute and runs NSFW livestreams (under the alias "Gyaru Mommy") to alleviate her boredom and slutty nature. Meanwhile, her rebellious daughter, Tanaka, is always trying to make quick cash from doing various NSFW work due to the relentless demands of her deadbeat boyfriend, Kazo.

Doujinshi (EN): The Gyaru Mother-Daughter Duo’s Filthy Way of Making Money

Doujinshi (JP): Gal Oyako no Egui Kasegikata

Artist: Armadillo Daiji
creator: Chunter
